query: Show me forecast labor demand by craft for the next 90 days
expected_behavior: Loads maximo-pm-planning (NOT maximo-work-orders — that's WO-level operational, not forecast)
Sums JPLABOR.LABORHRS through PM.JPNUM → JOBPLAN reference
Filters PM.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' and uses COALESCE(EXTDATE, NEXTDATE) for the effective due date
Expands PMSEQUENCE rows for multi-cadence PMs
Groups by CRAFT × week (or by CRAFT alone if the user wants a single number)
Does NOT mix in WORKORDER actuals (those are historical execution, not forecast demand)
